arts.sum: Liverpool top the Premier League, finished first in the Champions League table and are deep into the domestic cups - but will there be silverware to show for it?

arts.ttl: Can Mathys Tel play for Tottenham vs Liverpool in Carabao Cup semi-final? Transfer rule explained
arts.sum: It has been revealed whether or not Mathys Tel can play for Tottenham Hotspur in the second leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final. Having not previously played in the Carabao Cup for another team this season, the 19-year-old forward will be eligible to play against Liverpool on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Liverpool this evening one step away from the Carabao Cup final. Ange Postecoglou’s side have a one goal lead to protect at Anfield, after Lucas Bergvall’s winner in the first leg last month. Spurs have struggled this season but are two positive results from a first major trophy since 2008. arts.ttl: ‘Much higher offer’ from Tottenham saw Spurs ruin plans – Couldn’t compete with them
arts.sum: Juventus and Wolverhampton Wanderers showed keen interest in Kevin Danso before he moved to Tottenham Hotspur on February 2nd. The Serie A side and Wolves made advances, but Spurs were successful in completing the centre-back’s signing in the end on loan with an obligation to buy.
